mechanism: All application landing zones deploy into oases-prod regardless of environment tier. The environment parameter declares lifecycle stage — it does not control management group placement.
why: Teams need test workloads under the same policy, RBAC, and network constraints as prod. Splitting tiers across hierarchies breaks that guarantee.

related.note: oases-test is the platform sandbox — application workloads don't belong there.
Single profile serves all environment tiers.

violations: Application landing zone created in oases-test hierarchy.
environment parameter used to route to a different management group.
